candidate_definitions.text: Invoke is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.
<div align="center">
Grounding DINO with Segment Anything & Stable Diffusion colab
🐣 Please follow me for new updates https://twitter.com/camenduru

OpenMMLab Multimodal Advanced, Generative, and Intelligent Creation Toolbox. Unlock the magic 🪄: Generative-AI (AIGC), easy-to-use APIs, awsome model zoo, diffusion models, for text-to-image generation, image/video restoration/enhancement, etc.
<div id="top" align="center">
🦙  LaMa Image Inpainting, Resolution-robust Large Mask Inpainting with Fourier Convolutions, WACV 2022
by Roman Suvorov, Elizaveta Logacheva, Anton Mashikhin,
Image inpainting tool powered by SOTA AI Model. Remove any unwanted object, defect, people from your pictures or erase and replace(powered by stable diffusion) any thing on your pictures.

Kandinsky 2 — multilingual text2image latent diffusion model
[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1MfN9dfmejT8NjXhR353NeP5RzbruHgo7?usp=sharing) — Inference example
Keras implementation of "Image Inpainting via Generative Multi-column Convolutional Neural Networks" paper published at NIPS 2018

Image Restoration with Mean-Reverting Stochastic Differential Equations, ICML 2023. Winning solution of the NTIRE 2023 Image Shadow Removal Challenge.

Run Stable Diffusion on Android Devices with Snapdragon NPU acceleration. Also supports CPU/GPU inference.
